introSection: Snoopy's Racing Railway is a steel launched roller coaster located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada. It opened on May 18, 2023. The ride is a clone of Fridolin's verrückter Zauberexpress at Fantasiana.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was announced along with Tundra Twister on 11 August 2022.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an engine, with conducteur Snoopy at the back car. The train is 1 car longer compared to the original in Austria.

fullText:
Snoopy's Racing Railway is a steel launched roller coaster located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada. It opened on May 18, 2023. The ride is a clone of Fridolin's verrückter Zauberexpress at Fantasiana.

The ride was announced along with Tundra Twister on 11 August 2022.



Grey track and brown supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine, with conducteur Snoopy at the back car. The train is 1 car longer compared to the original in Austria.
